# Cakes by Steph
> Bespoke custom cake atelier in Leesburg, VA. Wedding cakes, quinceañera cakes, birthday cakes, and authentic Peruvian pastries. 5.0★ rated.

Stephanie personally designs, bakes, and delivers every commission. No apprentices. No mixes. 100% from scratch using premium ingredients — real butter, farm-fresh eggs, Madagascar vanilla, Valrhona chocolate.

**Phone:** (240) 471-5637  
**Location:** Leesburg, VA 20176  
**Instagram:** @_cakes_bysteph_llc  
**Service Area:** Leesburg, Ashburn, Sterling, Herndon, Reston, Chantilly, Fairfax, Vienna, McLean, Loudoun County, Northern Virginia

## Services
- Wedding cakes (white-glove delivery, on-site setup)
- Quinceañera cakes (signature specialty)
- Birthday cakes (kids, adults, milestones)
- Peruvian pastries (alfajores, tres leches, milhojas)
- Baby shower & baptism cakes
- Corporate & branded event cakes

## Pricing
- Private tasting: $55 (credited to order)
- Custom cakes starting at $195
- 50% deposit holds date, final payment 1 week before

## Why Cakes by Steph
Weekends book 4-6 weeks out. Limited monthly commissions to preserve quality. Every cake receives a custom design mockup before baking begins.
